parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "1020357": "{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json['房客2電話'] ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['房客2電話'] : (($('格式化_降解').item.json['連絡電話1'] !== $('Loop Over Items').item.json['主承租人電話'] && (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] === '')) ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['主承租人電話'] : '') }}",
  "1020354": "{{ ($('格式化_降解').item.json['房客姓名1'] || '') !== ($('Loop Over Items').item.json['承租方'] || '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['承租方'] : $('格式化_降解').item.json['房客姓名1'] }}",
  "1020358": "{{ $ifEmpty($('Loop Over Items').item.json['房客2'], $json['1020358']) }}",
  "1020355": "{{ (!$json['性別'] || $json['性別'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['性別'] : $json['性別'] }}",
  "1020360": "{{ (!$json.email || $json.email === "" || $json.email !== $('Loop Over Items').item.json.email) ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json.email : $json.email }}",
  "1020361": "{{ (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人'] : $json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] }}",
  "1020362": "{{ (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急電話'] : $json['緊急連絡人電話1'] }}",
  "1020363": "{{ (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人關係'] : $json['緊急聯絡人關係1'] }}",
  "1020365": "{{ ($json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] !== $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人']) && (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人'] : '' }}",
  "1020366": "{{ ($json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] !== $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人']) && (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急電話'] : '' }}",
  "1020367": "{{ ($json['緊急連絡人姓名1'] !== $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人']) && (!$json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] || $json['緊急連絡人姓名2'] === '') ? $('Loop Over Items').item.json['緊急聯絡人關係'] : '' }}",
  "1020364": "{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json['通訊地址'] }}",
  "1020373": "{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json['戶籍地址'] }}",
  "1020368": "{{ $('Loop Over Items').item.json['身分證字號'] }}",
  "1020576": "{{ $now }}"
}
